response.justification: While the candidate is a highly experienced and versatile software craftsman, their background is primarily in web and full-stack development (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) rather than C++. They fall critically short of the mandatory 5–10 years of C++ experience on Windows and lack the required capital markets or fixed income domain expertise, making them unsuited for this specific role.
strengths: Over 15 years of versatile software development experience across various technologies and platforms.
Strong background in CI/CD pipelines, test-driven development, and DevOps infrastructure.
Demonstrated leadership and architectural skills, including founding an open-source data platform.
concerns: Severely lacks the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development experience.
Missing required fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain expertise.
No demonstrated experience with Windows platform development or enterprise SQL Server/Oracle.
